creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Here's how the build is failing:

http://pd.valinor.palantiri.org/data/84amd64-default/2015-03-21_09h35m26s/logs/errors/doublecmd-0.6.0.log

and here are the checksums of the files after patching:
